steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the big animal?
Where does the big animal live?
questions.hint: You can find barns and fields here!

questions.question_text: What is the big animal's favorite drink?
questions.hint: It falls from the sky as rain.

items.definition: Person who takes care of animals

items.example: That is a cow. It says Moo!

steps.title: On the Farm
steps.text: Look at the big farm. That is a cow. It says Moo. Is that a horse? Yes, it is! The farmer smiles.

steps.explanation: Use 'That is' for something far away.

steps.audio_text: On the farm, the farmer waves hello. The cow says moo, and the horse neighs by the fence.

questions.question: What sound does the cow make?
Who says hello on the farm?

steps.prompt: Point and Say: That is a horse.

questions.question_text: Where does the cow live? (Vocabulary question)
Complete the sentence: That is a ___. (Grammar question)
What does the farmer do on the farm? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: A horse can live in the ocean.
Which animal says 'Moo'? (Vocabulary question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do sheep eat on the farm? 🐑
questions.hint: It's green and grows in fields!

questions.question_text: What color are baby ducks usually? 🐥
questions.hint: It's the same color as bananas!

questions.question_text: Where do ducks like to swim? 🦆💧
questions.hint: It's a small, still body of water!

items.example: That is a sheep. It says baa.
Is that a duck? It says quack.

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: That is a white sheep. Is that a duck? Yes, the duck can swim. It says quack! I love animals.

steps.explanation: Use to say what an animal is.

steps.audio_text: Look, there are three ducks swimming in the water. Is that duck saying quack? Yes, it says quack!

questions.question: What sound does the duck make?

questions.question_text: What color is a sheep? (Vocabulary question)
Is that a ___? (Complete the question, Grammar question)
Where do ducks swim? (Reading comprehension question)
Are sheep and ducks small animals? (Comprehension question)
Fill in the blank: 'The ___ is white.' (Vocabulary review)

lessons.title: Pig and Chicken
lessons.topic: Birds, pigs and animal sound recognition

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal has feathers and can fly above the barn?
questions.hint: This animal lays eggs and says cluck.

questions.question_text: Which small animal on the farm is known for laying eggs and can swim?
questions.hint: This animal likes water and quacks.

questions.question_text: Which animal gives us milk and eats grass?
questions.hint: This animal says moo and is black and white or brown.

items.example: That is a pig. It says Oink.
Is that a chicken? It says Cluck.
That is an egg from a chicken.
Look at the mud! Is that a pig in it?

steps.title: Farm Friends
steps.text: Look at the pig. It is very pink. The pig is in the mud. That is a chicken. Is that a chicken egg? The egg is big!

steps.explanation: Say what sound an animal makes.

steps.audio_text: Listen! The rooster is crowing early in the morning. That is a big pig, rolling in the mud!

questions.question: Is the pig rolling in the mud?

questions.question_text: What animal loves to play in the mud? (Vocabulary question)
Complete the sentence: It says _____. (Grammar question)
What does a chicken lay? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: A pig can fly. (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal makes milk and has a big udder?
questions.hint: This animal is big and goes 'moo'!

questions.question_text: Which animal is pink and loves mud?
Which animal gives us wool for sweaters?
questions.hint: This animal is fluffy and goes 'baa'!

steps.title: Morning on the Farm
steps.text: Good morning! I see the sun. That is a rooster. Is that a cow? It says Moo! The hen is laying eggs. I love my animals!

steps.audio_text: Listen to the cow. It says moo! Oh, and do you see the white duck? It's swimming in the pond.

questions.question: What sound does the cow make?

steps.prompt: Say: That is a cow. What does it say?
steps.expected_text: that is a cow it says moo

questions.question_text: That is a ___ animal. It says baa. (Grammar question)
Which sound does a cow make? (Vocabulary question)
Is that a horse? It says quack. (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: A duck can swim.
Fill in the blank: Is that a ___? (Grammar question)
